title: submit-pipeline output data
description:
Shape of the ``data`` field on a ``submit-pipeline`` envelope.

``stage_reached`` is the deterministic dispatch the agent used to walk by
hand. ``needs_decision`` flags the gate failures that require a caller
decision — the decision-as-data shape (#231): the pipeline ran every
deterministic branch; only the genuine judgement is handed back.

stage_reached.description: Which stage the pipeline reached / stopped at.
stage_reached.title: Stage Reached

needs_decision.description: True for the gate failures (canary / verify-submitted) that need a caller decision; False for the clean terminal stages (complete / deduped).
needs_decision.title: Needs Decision

reason.description: Human-readable summary of the outcome / what must be decided.
reason.title: Reason

job_ids.description: Main array job ids; empty unless the main array launched.
job_ids.title: Job Ids

deduped.description: True when the submit half was a deduped replay.
deduped.title: Deduped

verified.description: True iff the canary was verified and the main array launched (#160).
verified.title: Verified

failure_kind.description: Canary failure kind on ``stage_reached='canary_failed'``; else None.
failure_kind.title: Failure Kind

verify_submitted_ok.description: Post-qsub scheduler health; None when that stage was not reached.
verify_submitted_ok.title: Verify Submitted Ok

monitor_spec_path.description: Pre-staged monitor spec path (set on the complete stage).
monitor_spec_path.title: Monitor Spec Path

aggregate_spec_path.description: Pre-staged aggregate spec path (set on the complete stage).
aggregate_spec_path.title: Aggregate Spec Path

verify_submitted_result.description: The verify-submitted ``data`` on a ``verify_submitted_failed`` stage (the error/held/missing job ids + states the caller surfaces).
verify_submitted_result.title: Verify Submitted Result
